flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion fell 17 pp at Washington County Community College vs the 2003–2007 baseline (43.4% vs 60.9%).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Washington County Community College fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (11.2% → 0.0%).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at Washington County Community College rose 93% between 2021 and 2024 (230 → 443).
